description: CompositionBlue sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has ribbing made of 97% cotton and 3% spandex around the round neckline, sleeve cuffs, side panels and hemline, has long sleeves and embroidered swoosh logo on the upper left chestFittingRegularWash careMachine wash cold with like coloursDo not bleach Tumble dry on lowCool iron onlyDo not dry cleanDo not iron on print or embroiderynike gets you ready for the winter in this blue sweatshirt. The ribbed panels on the sides are a refreshing addition to this winter staple, while the thick fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth. Team this with long sleeved tees, regular jeans and canvas shoes.
